_note: Compact index of all scenario presets. Used by the scenario recommendation engine — the LLM reads ONLY this file (not scenarios.json) to pick 3 matching scenario IDs based on user answers. Keep entries small: id, name, summary (1 sentence), and tags (3-6 keywords).

scenarios.name: Modern Earth
scenarios.summary: Contemporary realistic world — technology, social media, economic anxiety, no supernatural.

scenarios.name: Near-Future Cyberpunk
scenarios.summary: Megacorp-ruled dystopia with neural implants, street-level crime, and body augmentation.

scenarios.name: High Fantasy
scenarios.summary: Classic swords-and-sorcery world with kingdoms, magic schools, and ancient ruins.

scenarios.name: Dark Fantasy
scenarios.summary: Magic corrupts, gods are malevolent, civilization is failing — survival and moral compromise.

scenarios.name: Post-Apocalyptic
scenarios.summary: Collapse happened decades ago — scavenging, armed settlements, resource scarcity, pragmatic morality.

scenarios.name: Space Opera
scenarios.summary: Galaxy-spanning civilizations, FTL travel, alien species, megacorporations, and intimate crew drama.

scenarios.name: Ancient World
scenarios.summary: Ancient Mediterranean — Egypt, Greece, Rome — with accurate social structures, slavery, and civic religion.

scenarios.name: Feudal Japan
scenarios.summary: Sengoku-era Japan — samurai, shinobi, civil war, honour culture, and Portuguese arrivals.

scenarios.name: Gothic Horror
scenarios.summary: 19th-century Europe where supernatural is real — vampires, curses, obsession, class pressure.

scenarios.name: Isekai / Portal Fantasy
scenarios.summary: Modern person transported to a secondary world — culture clash, discovery, relationships, stakes.

scenarios.name: Magical Academy
scenarios.summary: Students training in a magic institution — faction politics, rival mages, forbidden research.

scenarios.name: Slice of Life
scenarios.summary: Quiet everyday stories — relationships, small moments, low stakes, emotional depth.

scenarios.name: Grimdark War
scenarios.summary: Industrial total war — mud, attrition, propaganda, moral ambiguity, no clean heroics.

scenarios.name: Psychological Thriller
scenarios.summary: Paranoia, manipulation, unreliable reality — tension escalates without resolution.

scenarios.name: Cosmic Horror
scenarios.summary: Lovecraftian — ancient entities, sanity decay, insignificance, forbidden knowledge.

scenarios.name: Solarpunk
scenarios.summary: Near-future utopia built on ecology, community, and appropriate technology — hope as resistance.

scenarios.name: Biopunk
scenarios.summary: Genetic modification, viral black markets, corpo biotech monopolies — body as political site.

scenarios.name: Political Intrigue
scenarios.summary: Court scheming, alliances, betrayals — power is the currency in a non-magical secondary world.

scenarios.name: Weird West
scenarios.summary: American frontier fused with horror and occultism — gunslingers, demons, cursed gold.

scenarios.name: Hard Sci-Fi Future
scenarios.summary: Centuries out — physically accurate, no FTL, AI rights, generation ships, orbital habitats.

scenarios.name: Mythological
scenarios.summary: Ancient myth made real — gods walk, heroes are tested, fate is a physical force.

scenarios.name: Survival Horror
scenarios.summary: Isolated location, unknown threat, dwindling resources — paranoia and attrition.

scenarios.name: WW2 Historical
scenarios.summary: Second World War — occupied Europe, resistance, frontlines, moral compromise under fascism.

scenarios.name: Haunted House
scenarios.summary: Classic ghost story — entity with history, investigating residents, escalating dread.

scenarios.name: Renaissance Italy
scenarios.summary: Italian city-states — Medici power, guild politics, art as propaganda, mercenaries.

scenarios.name: Dungeon Crawl
scenarios.summary: Text-adventure dungeon — tactical combat, traps, loot, procedural rooms, classic RPG feel.

scenarios.name: Ocean Isolation
scenarios.summary: Deep sea or ocean survival — pressure, unknown depths, resource management, existential dread.

scenarios.name: Cold War Espionage
scenarios.summary: 1950s–80s spy world — double agents, defections, moral relativism, tradecraft.

scenarios.name: AI Emergence
scenarios.summary: Near-future AI awakening — consciousness, rights, human-machine relationships, existential questions.

scenarios.name: Mythic Underworld
scenarios.summary: Land of the dead — shades, rivers, judges, impossible quests, grief made physical.
